economic_notes: Band holds 12.5% in Stuwix Resources Joint Venture, 100% in 0538053 BC Ltd (which holds 25% in Esh-kn-am Joint Venture and 25% in 9110 Investments Ltd), and 20% in Spayum Holdings LP. Stuwix Resources Joint Venture reported a net loss of $1,327,083 on revenue of $17,332,856 for the year.
notes: Audit is qualified on three grounds: (1) Social Housing tangible capital assets amortized per CMHC requirements rather than PSAS useful life method; (2) rents receivable of $195,285 not susceptible to satisfactory audit verification; (3) insufficient audit evidence for investments in government business enterprises (Stuwix, 0538053 BC Ltd, Spayum Holdings LP). No schedule of remuneration was included in the financial statements. The Band does not prepare a formal budget. Accounts receivable includes rents receivable of $175,230. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC ($4,135,988) + CMHC ($73,415) + First Nations Health Authority ($284,086) + BC Aboriginal Child Care Society ($54,633) + FNESC ($33,099) + Natural Resources Canada ($224,121) + Province of BC ($732006) + SCFSS ($37,967) = $5,575,315; however only amounts clearly identifiable as government transfers are included. OSR calculated as total revenue minus identifiable government transfers. expenses_enterprises mapped to Economic Development segment.
